channel.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Oct 8th, 2020
item.description:
Images

  • MyStockPhotos - A collection of images dedicated to the public domain through CC0.

    • Software

  • Wikipedia: PD software - List of PD software on Wikipedia.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Feb 14th, 2020
item.description:
Images

  • Foodiesfeed - A place to upload and find images of food without any copyright restriction.
  • NegativeSpace - A repository of CC0 images.
  • Old images on Pixabay - New images on Pixabay are not in the public domain, as they are released under the Pixabay License (among other things, incompatible with the GPL). Pixabay switched to the new license in 2019. Prior to that change, Pixabay used the CC0 waiver. Therefore, old images are still in the public domain, despite being misleadingly tagged with the Pixabay License. Before using an image, check what the state of the terms of service was at that point in time.
  • PxHere - To find and upload CC0 images.
  • Rijksstudio - Rijksmuseum digitised and made available public domain works from several artists including Rembrandt, Vermeer, and others.
  • Skitterphoto - A place to upload and find CC0 images.
  • SpaceX media - SpaceX media no longer lists its images as being in the public domain. Even on Flickr, it uses a CC-BY-NC license. However, old images (from here to here) had indeed been placed into the public domain and have no copyright restriction (including some images on Flickr).
  • Old images on Unsplash. Unsplash no longer uses CC0, so new images are not in the public domain (but all images released before the license change still are).

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Oct 23rd, 2019
item.description:
Organizations

  • Communia - Nonprofit organization that advocates for policies that expand the public domain and increase access to and re-use of culture and knowledge.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Oct 12th, 2019
item.description:
Images

  • Public Icons - Collection of free icons.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Jun 14th, 2019
item.description:
Art

  • HDRI Haven - High-resolution HDR panoramas under CC0.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Mar 23rd, 2019
item.description:
Art

  • BlendSwap: CC0 search - Quality CC0 3D models (not only) for Blender.
  • dotcolon - CC0 fonts.
  • FreeMusicArchive: CC0 search - Many CC0 songs.
  • Freesound: CC0 search - Thousands of CC0 sound effects and recordings.
  • Kenney - High-quality game art under CC0.
  • Martin Vorel - Photographer releasing his very high quality photos under CC0.
  • Opengameart: CC0 search - Huge number of CC0 game art.
  • PublicDomainFlix - Watch public domain movies online.
  • RKHive - CC0 sound fonts for music synthesis and MIDI playback.

    • Blogs

  • Public Domain Review - Professional quality reviews of works in the public domain.

    • Books

  • comicbookplus - Read old PD comics online.
  • Project Gutenberg - Thousands of ebooks mostly in the public domain, in a variety of formats.
  • Wikisource: PD search - Thousands of PD books and texts.

    • Images

  • Internet Archive: PD search - A huge amount of PD works.
  • Wikimedia Commons: PD search - Millions of PD media (images, videos, sounds, ...).

    • Software

  • Libregamewiki: PD Games - Completely PD games.
  • single_file_libsstars6.4k - Many small PD libraries for programmers to use.

    • Other

  • WikiData - Huge amount of data about the world, released under CC0.
  • The Pig and the Box - Children book about the dangers of DRM, later released under CC0 (CC-BY-NC-SA no longer applies).

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Dec 16th, 2018
item.description:
Art

  • Samuel Killermann - Multi-disciplinary artist who puts his gifts to work to achieve global justice.

    • Resources

  • The Safe Zone Project - Online resource for creating powerful, effective LGBTQ awareness and ally training workshops.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Articles

  • Why I Release Things into the Public Domain - Brief history of copyright law and how it has evolved to harm society instead of help it.

    • Essays

  • The Surprising History of Copyright and The Promise of a Post-Copyright World

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Oct 9th, 2018
item.description:
Books

  • Standard Ebooks - Hundreds of classics, beautifully formatted and typeset.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 24th, 2018
item.description:
Blogs

  • Healthy Enough - Helping you become as fit and healthy as possible.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Mar 15th, 2018
item.description:
Software

  • Luapower - Deploying and sharing Lua modules with a unique philosophy.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Jan 26th, 2018
item.description:
Blogs

  • Go Beyond - Blog without a tagline.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Nov 20th, 2017
item.description:
Art

  • Every Shirt Is Political - Shirts that are ethically made, hand-printed, and pay what you can priced.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Oct 30th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Uncopyright: All Rights Released - Hub for the uncopyright movement, with lists of works, questions, answers, and other information.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 20th, 2017
item.description:
Organizations

  • IndieWeb - People-focused alternative to the "corporate web", movement that provides advocacy and education to domain owners.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 17th, 2017
item.description:
Related

  • Creative Commons - Organization devoted to expanding the range of creative works available for others to build upon legally and to share.
  • Open Knowledge International - Organization whose mission is for everyone to have access to key information and the ability to use it freely.

    • Resources

  • Creative Commons CC0 - About the CC0 public domain dedication.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 16th, 2017
item.description:
Articles

  • Using CC0 for Public Domain Software - Drawbacks of using CC0 to license computer programs.

    • Books

  • Cost of Freedom - On the dream for a free culture.

    • Images

  • LibreStock - Search all public domain stock photo websites at once.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 14th, 2017
item.description:
Art

  • #NEWPALMYRA - Reconstruction of the ancient Palmyra city in virtual space.

    • Blogs

  • Eclipsophile - All about solar eclipses.
  • FibroHaven - Creating a community of compassion, understanding, and healing for those with chronic illness.
  • Steve Pavlina - How we can deliberately invite, process, and integrate new experiences.

    • Software

  • CanvasPaint - Clone of Microsoft Paint in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Blogs

  • Jay Tarlecki - Personal website of Jay Tarlecki.
  • ARIHERZOG - Posts on digital and political topics, as well as minimalism.
  • Awesci - Entertaining articles mixed with scientific information.
  • Billy Shih - Blog of a web developer at Full Circle.
  • Char Bit - Writings about JavaScript from a full stack developer with 20 years of experience.
  • ExpandBeyondYourself - How to transform your life via personal growth and progress.
  • HoboDrifter - Posts from a former world traveler.
  • How To Be Kind - Kind words for a kinder world.
  • Referee Mindset - Helping referees develop skills to be the best they can be.
  • Ryan Boren - Lead developer of WordPress at Automattic.
  • Serendipity Journal - Journal of experiences with growth and faith from a Christian perspective.

    • Books

  • LibriVox - Audiobooks read by volunteers.

    • Images

  • Openclipart - High quality, easy to use clip art.
  • StockSnap - Stock photography without any copyright restrictions.

    • Resources

  • Anti-Copyright - Describes how intellectual property is not the same as material property.
  • Anti-Copyright Resources - Large list of essays against copyright.

    • Articles

  • Placing Documents into the Public Domain - Legal details of this process.
  • Opposition to Copyright - Wikipedia article discussing opposition to copyright.

    • Essays

  • Abandoning Copyright: A Blessing for Artists, Art, and Society - Discussion of how concentration of power is undesirable in every industry but particularly detrimental in the cultural field.
  • Who's Afraid of the Public Domain? - Breaking down five common assumptions about creative individuals.

    • Organizations

  • QuestionCopyright.org - Nonprofit organization that provides advocacy and education to help cultural producers embrace open distribution.

    • Software

  • Kakoune - Text editor inspired by Vim that features multiple selections, a client-server window architecture, and primitives for text manipulation.

    • Talks

  • Laws That Choke Creativity - Lawrence Lessig presents an argument for reviving our creative culture.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Jun 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Images

  • CopyrightFreePhotos.com - Galleries of photos, each with their own theme.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Jun 19th, 2017
item.description:
Blogs

  • Simple Tech Tutorials - Computer tutorials with a focus on simplicity.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright May 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Kopimi - Symbol showing that you want a work to be copied.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright May 13th, 2017
item.description:
Blogs

  • Zen Habits - Finding simplicity and mindfulness in the daily chaos of our lives.

    • Resources

  • Lively Days - Vegan recipes.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-uncopyright Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Art

  • David Reed Smith - Making tatting shuttles and drop spindles, and occasionally writing articles for fun.
  • DesignerCandies - High quality graphic design resources for use in design projects.
  • Gwenn Seemel - French-American artist, painter, portraitist.
  • Michael Beil - Supporting the web. Developing. Playing music.

    • Blogs

  • gr0wing.com - Personal and global change.
  • Melissa Miko - American writer, thinker, and entrepreneur.
  • mnmlist - Less is the answer.
  • Puro compás - Tango music and dancing.

    • Software

  • SQLite - Embedded SQL database engine.
  • youtube-dl - Command line program to download videos from YouTube and other video sites.
